name: 11L SmearGate + BigramHash(10240) + Causal TTT + Mixed Int5/Int6 + SWA
blurb: 11-layer GPT with SmearGate, BigramHash(10240), Z-loss, mixed int5/int6 quantization, 3% magnitude pruning, SWA(frac=0.4), and causal Test-Time Training. Built on PR #162 (SmearGate/BigramHash) and PR #180 (mixed quant). Requesting RunPod credits to run 3-seed validation on 8xH100.
author: romainsantoli-web
